allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/tts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-raiko-token: raiko-dev' -d '{"text":"Voice system is ready for testing."}' --output /tmp/test-voice.wav -w 'Status: %{http_code}\\n')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/tts -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'x-raiko-token: raiko-dev' -d '{"text":"Your voice control system is fully operational. The Piper text to speech engine generates professional quality audio with natural sounding voices."}' --output /tmp/validation-audio.wav -w '\\nStatus: %{http_code}\\n')
